label: quantitative temperature growth capability
definition: The capability of an organism to grow at specific temperatures or within a temperature range.

label: has growth temperature minimum
definition: The minimum temperature at which an organism can grow.

label: has growth temperature maximum
definition: The maximum temperature at which an organism can grow.

label: quantitative salt tolerance capability
definition: The capability of an organism to tolerate or require specific concentrations of salt (NaCl).

label: has NaCl concentration optimum
definition: The optimal NaCl concentration for growth (w/v percentage).

label: has NaCl concentration minimum
definition: The minimum NaCl concentration tolerated for growth.

label: has NaCl concentration maximum
definition: The maximum NaCl concentration tolerated for growth.

label: quantitative pH tolerance capability
definition: The capability of an organism to grow at specific pH values or within a pH range.

label: has pH optimum
definition: The optimal pH for growth (pH scale 0-14).

label: has pH minimum
definition: The minimum pH at which growth can occur.

label: has pH maximum
definition: The maximum pH at which growth can occur.
